title: Street Fighter 6/Patch Notes - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Officially documented gameplay changes will be prioritized for these pages. Language and terminology might be changed from the source for clarity or to match the wiki's own terminology. Version IDs and release dates were taken from the PC/Steam release. Consoles might include additional updates focused on improving game performance and stability, or minor bug fixes. version gameversion date summary links 2.0301 2.0301 2026-05-28 Ingrid Release. Minor system changes and bug fixes. Patch Notes 2.0202 2.0202 2026-04-15 Bug fixes for the game system as well as JP and M. Bison. Patch Notes 2.02 2.02 2026-03-17 Alex Release. Balance changes for all characters. Patch Notes 2.0111 2.0111 2025-12-16 Bug fixes and minor adjustments, primarily for Elena, Mai, and Sagat. Patch Notes 2.01 2.01 2025-10-15 C. Viper Release. Minor bug fixes and adjustments for some characters. Patch Notes 2.00 2.00 2025-08-05 Sagat Release. Minor bug fixes and adjustments (mostly related to Tiger Shot interactions). Patch Notes 1.10 1.10 2025-06-03 Elena Release. Balance changes for all characters. Patch Notes 1.09 1.09 2025-02-05 Mai Release. Minor bug fixes. Patch Notes 1.08 1.08 2024-12-02 Minor balance changes for all characters. Patch Notes 1.07 1.07 2024-09-24 Terry Release. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. Patch Notes 1.06 1.06 2024-06-26 M. Bison Release. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. Patch Notes 1.05 1.05 2024-05-22 Akuma Release. Balance changes for all characters. Patch Notes 1.04 1.04 2024-02-27 Ed Release. Several balance changes and bug fixes. Patch Notes 1.03 1.03 2023-12-01 Costume 3 release. Minor bug fixes. Patch Notes 1.02 1.02 2023-09-27 A.K.I. Release. Bug fixes with some minor changes due to bugs Patch Notes 1.01 1.01 2023-07-24 Rashid Release. Bug fixes with some minor balance changes mainly for Modern controls. Patch Notes 1.00 1.00 2023-06-02 Launch version.
